"""JSON-facing API used by WMS-Prep through Pyodide."""

from __future__ import annotations

from wms_prep_distortion_models import (
    quartic_from_tau_prime,
    rotate_quadrupole_nuclei,
    rotate_sextic_inertial,
    rotate_tau_prime,
    rotated_sigma_inputs,
    sextic_from_inertial,
)
from wms_prep_representation_utils import (
    inverse_representation_token,
    normalize_representation_token,
    rotate_abc_values,
)


def _sigma_label(source: object) -> str:
    if source == "ABC":
        return "A/B/C"
    if source == "moments":
        return "Ia/Ib/Ic"
    if source == "sigma":
        return "Gaussian Sigma"
    return "default s=0"


def _build_quartic_payload(component: object, target_representation: str) -> dict[str, object] | None:
    if not isinstance(component, dict) or not isinstance(component.get("tauPrime"), dict):
        return None
    rep_in = component.get("inputRepresentation") or target_representation
    rotated_tau = rotate_tau_prime(component.get("tauPrime"), rep_in, target_representation)
    sigma_inputs = rotated_sigma_inputs(component, target_representation)
    quartic = quartic_from_tau_prime(rotated_tau, sigma_inputs["sigma"])
    return {
        "contextLabel": component.get("contextLabel") or "",
        "inputRepresentation": target_representation,
        "tauPrime": rotated_tau,
        "rotationalConstantsMHz": sigma_inputs["rotationalConstantsMHz"],
        "moments": sigma_inputs["moments"],
        "sigma": quartic["sigma"],
        "sigma1": quartic["sigma1"],
        "sigmaSource": sigma_inputs["sigmaSource"],
        "sigmaLabel": _sigma_label(sigma_inputs["sigmaSource"]),
        "T": quartic["T"],
        "asym": quartic["asymFormatted"],
        "sym": quartic["symFormatted"],
    }


def _build_sextic_payload(
    component: object,
    target_representation: str,
    quartic_payload: object = None,
) -> dict[str, object] | None:
    if not isinstance(component, dict) or not isinstance(component.get("inertial"), dict):
        return None
    rep_in = component.get("inputRepresentation") or target_representation
    rotated_inertial = rotate_sextic_inertial(
        component.get("inertial"),
        rep_in,
        target_representation,
    )
    sigma_inputs = rotated_sigma_inputs(component, target_representation)
    rotational_constants = rotate_abc_values(
        component.get("rotationalConstantsMHz"),
        "Ir",
        inverse_representation_token(target_representation),
    )
    quartic_t = None
    if isinstance(quartic_payload, dict):
        quartic_t = quartic_payload.get("T")
        if rotational_constants is None:
            rotational_constants = rotate_abc_values(
                quartic_payload.get("rotationalConstantsMHz"),
                target_representation,
                inverse_representation_token(target_representation),
            )

    sextic = sextic_from_inertial(
        rotated_inertial,
        sigma_inputs["sigma"],
        quartic_t,
        rotational_constants,
    )
    return {
        "contextLabel": component.get("contextLabel") or "",
        "inputRepresentation": target_representation,
        "inertial": rotated_inertial,
        "sigma": sextic["sigma"],
        "sigma1": sextic["sigma1"],
        "sigmaSource": sigma_inputs["sigmaSource"],
        "sigmaLabel": _sigma_label(sigma_inputs["sigmaSource"]),
        "cylindrical": sextic["cylindrical"],
        "B": sextic["B"],
        "SIntermediates": sextic["SIntermediates"],
        "asymSextic": sextic["asymFormatted"],
        "symSextic": sextic["symFormatted"],
    }


def process_gaussian_log_payload(payload: object) -> dict[str, object]:
    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
        raise ValueError("WMS-Prep Pyodide payload must be a dictionary.")

    target_representation = normalize_representation_token(
        payload.get("outputRepresentation"),
        "Ir",
    )
    warnings: list[str] = []
    result = {
        "outputRepresentation": target_representation,
        "warnings": warnings,
    }

    quartic = _build_quartic_payload(payload.get("quartic"), target_representation)
    if quartic is not None:
        result["quartic"] = quartic

    sextic = _build_sextic_payload(payload.get("sextic"), target_representation, quartic)
    if sextic is not None:
        result["sextic"] = sextic

    quadrupole = rotate_quadrupole_nuclei(payload.get("quadrupole"), target_representation)
    warnings.extend(quadrupole.get("warnings", []))
    result["quadrupole"] = quadrupole

    return result
